tasks.label: Launch APK
tasks.command: adb wait-for-device && adb install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && adb shell monkey -p your.package.name -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1

tasks.label: Build & Launch APK
tasks.command: ./gradlew assembleDebug && adb wait-for-device && adb install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && adb shell monkey -p your.package.name -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1
